codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: TestCASH FA metadata and initial supply are set correctly, admin-gated faucet is present, deploy-testnet.sh publishes with profile-derived named address, and tests cover decimals and initial supply. One script robustness issue was found but does not block expected behavior.

issues.description: With `set -euo pipefail` (line 21), failures in the `aptos config show-profiles | grep ...` pipeline can terminate the script before the explicit empty-address error branch (line 68) runs, reducing error clarity for invalid/missing profiles.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A new deployment workflow script was added, but `.factory/services.yaml` has no command entry for testnet deployment, so discoverable/shared operational commands are incomplete.

The `move-worker` skill prescribes a strict tests-first red phase, but the transcript shows implementation created before any failing test run while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` remained true; procedure wording/enforcement may be misaligned.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session `82d0b169-d89f-4699-aba8-63abf994606e` shows `Create contracts/sources/test_cash.move` before first `aptos move test --filter test_cash` execution.

summary: Reviewed feature `testnet-testcash-deploy` at commit 973ccc3. Requirements are met and review status is PASS, with one non-blocking deploy script error-handling robustness note and two shared-state observations.
